name: bash-completion
title: bash-completion
summary: programmable completion for the bash shell
description:
programmable completion for the bash shell
bash completion extends bash's standard completion behavior to achieve
complex command lines with just a few keystrokes.  This project was
conceived to produce programmable completion routines for the most
common Linux/UNIX commands, reducing the amount of typing sysadmins
and programmers need to do on a daily basis.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dh_bash-completion because programmable completion for the bash shell.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use dh_bash-completion as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dh_bash-completion [debhelper options]` as documented upstream for dh_bash-completion.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dh_bash-completion with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dh_bash-completion --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: dh_bash-completion - install bash completions for package
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install bash-completion. programmable completion for the bash shell.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: programmable completion for the bash shell.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: dh_bash-completion - install bash completions for package.
